entries.name: Burn
entries.description: Clinging embers sear the afflicted at each turn's end for the applied potency (fixed damage: ignores defense and affinity, so it stays relevant against armored and ashen foes). Reapplication refreshes the clock. Cure it, outheal it, or race it.

entries.name: Guard Break
entries.description: Guard shattered: defense is halved while it lasts. On a foe it opens the focus-fire window for the physical attacker; on your warden it flips the party's shield into the soft target — cure now or race the duration.
